name: memory-arbor-codex
description: Memory Arbor Codex integration using shared skills and prompt-submit hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Append Memory Arbor context before Codex prompts
interface.longDescription: Use Memory Arbor skills and a UserPromptSubmit hook from Codex. This prompt-hook adapter can append loaded memory context before each prompt, but cannot rewrite or delete prior host conversation messages.
defaultPrompt: Load relevant Memory Arbor context for this repository.
Continue from the shared Memory Arbor store.
